clc;
clear all;
close all;
SNR=10:1:33;

% BER_unary_8=[0.191800000000000,0.174700000000000,0.162100000000000,0.152100000000000,0.125900000000000,0.111400000000000,0.0996000000000000,0.0844000000000000,0.0751000000000000,0.0685000000000000,0.0552000000000000,0.0463000000000000,0.0389000000000000,0.0310000000000000,0.0267000000000000,0.0246000000000000,0.0194000000000000,0.0153000000000000,0.0129000000000000,0.00830000000000000,0.00710000000000000,0.00450000000000000,0.00290000000000000,0.00280000000000000,0.00170000000000000,0.001200000000000000,0.000900000000000000]
figure()
semilogy(SNR,smooth(BER_polar(1:2:end)),'r-o');
hold on;
grid on;
semilogy(SNR,BER_UNARY_8(1:2:end),'k--*');

xlabel('Transmite Power (dBm)');
ylabel('BER');
legend('Polar shaped P=0.7783','Unary code P=0.7783')
